---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to see?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why?**
What's the use case or problem this solves?

**Proposed solution (optional)**
If you have an idea of how it should work, describe it.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else — links, related issues, screenshots.
